surveys.comment: the wait was relatively quick for a saturday. the staff was professional and helpful. our problem is not yet resolved though
the sales clerk was very helpful in settling up my phone with my old number
dalton was very helpful with explaining my bill to me & discussing the changes to my plan.

tristin, our sales rep at the store, greeted us as we entered.  he was very knowledgeable as he explained  the different apple phones to us, costs of the additional line and the variety of products that were available for the phone. he did such a great job, soft spoken, no pressure, we ended up adding an apple watch, and an ipad to our order. we have been long term customers of comcast/xfinity, assured of the quality of your products, and of your personnel. tristan was one more excellent example of your company.many thanks,celia oprinovich

well, first of all your xfinity employee tried to sell me everything under the sun when i only wanted internet. second, i told him my house was newly built, and he kept stating that it would be ok that our internet service has been there before and i would be good to go. i was not good as my house as i already stayed in was brand new built on the land, therefore did not have a coax cable. therefore the internet would not work without it when i called your company. i had to wait a total of 75 minutes to speak with someone that is absolutely insane. then they want to tell me that i had to have someone pay a contractor and get the coax cable and then i could have the service. it was easier for me just to cancel within 24 hours of receiving your service and going with another company where i got everything included and did not have to pay to have a coax cable install installed.

1. i feel like i was lied to about bundles on store. when i checked my app it said my monthly bills were going to be $165 when i was told it’d be $75. over the phone they were able to get my bills lowered but also told me that what they had told me in store wasn’t true and it was not a bundle. after the phone call i got 29 text messages in a 4 minute window wanting me to approve a $280 order that i did not want or order so i never approved it. i still am not sure exactly wha tht services are, what i will owe, and feel like my entire experience has been extremely difficult when all i wanted was simple wifi. i will never recommend xfinity to anyone and once i don’t have to have it as my service will drop it immediately
the young man that helped us in the store was very knowledgeable and helpful!

i feel like xfinity is a scam. you promise that your bill's going to be cheaper but it's never and my signal is constantly going in and out all the time. i can't even complete a video call anymore. the staff itself is fantastic and the people that you have working for you are wonderful, but the corporatism is just too much

i went yesterday since i had gone before to ask if i can switch to you from verizon bringing my 5 lines with me to xfinity now and i was told that i was good to go with no down payment but since i still had to stay with verizon for 2 months i had to wait but i still went ahead and got the internet and one line which they had told me it was going to be free but at the end i had to pay $20 because it was an ipad which ok i let that go and now when i went yesterday to transfer my 5 i also asked about getting new phones for at least 3 lines and when i was there i was given a different amount of credit for 2 of them and asked for a breakdown and was told that i had to wait for the trade ins and when i got home and checked my bank account i saw a deduction of $556 which to me was ridiculous so i went back today to get a breakdown and the same guy said that i forgot my receipt which was a lie since i asked for 1 yesterday and at the end it was a $300 difference and was told to call corporate and see if i can get credited the difference and now i’m thinking of returning everything and going to another provider which it’s still in the window to return everything.
